creator: jhein@timing.com
text:
cvs2svn in ports is the older 2.2.0.

Fix: Here's a patch to update cvs2svn to 2.3.0.
One difference is the man page is now to be
generated during the build.

Maintainer was notified with this patch on 9/27.
I realize we're still in a ports freeze (I think), but
I thought I'd get it into a PR since I didn't hear back.
